__data__.text:
Table: gold.dim_article
Columns:
  - article_key (Int64)
  - article_id (Int64)
  - nom (Nullable(String))
  - description (Nullable(String))
  - unite (Nullable(String))
  - is_showing (Nullable(UInt8))
Primary/Order key: article_key

Business Context:
Article/Category dimension (29 categories total). ARTICLE = CATEGORY not individual product. Columns: article_key, article_id, nom (article/category name), description, unite (unit). Examples: 'HIKVISION' is an article/brand/category. Use for filtering/grouping by article type. Join to dim_product via article_id.

Table: gold.dim_currency
Columns:
  - currency_key (Int64)
  - currency_id (Int64)
  - nom (String)
  - symbole (Nullable(String))
  - taux_change (Float64)
Primary/Order key: currency_key

Table: gold.dim_customer
Columns:
  - customer_key (Int64)
  - customer_id (Int64)
  - code_client (Nullable(Int64))
  - nom_societe_client (Nullable(String))
  - adresse_societe_client (Nullable(String))
  - matricule_fiscale (Nullable(String))
  - type_client (Nullable(String))
  - solde_client (Nullable(Float64))
  - email (Nullable(String))
  - telephone (Nullable(String))
  - firstname (Nullable(String))
  - lastname (Nullable(String))
Primary/Order key: customer_key

Business Context:
Customer master. Use nom_societe_client for company name.

Table: gold.dim_date
Columns:
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - full_date (Date)
  - day_num (UInt8)
  - day_name (String)
  - week_num (UInt8)
  - month_num (UInt8)
  - month_name (String)
  - quarter_num (UInt8)
  - year_num (UInt16)
  - is_weekend (UInt8)
Primary/Order key: date_key

Business Context:
Date dimension. Always join here for time filtering using date_key.

Table: gold.dim_delivery_note
Columns:
  - delivery_note_key (Int64)
  - delivery_note_id (Int64)
  - reference (Nullable(String))
  - adresse_livraison (Nullable(String))
  - created_at (Nullable(DateTime64(6)))
  - date_livraison (Nullable(Date))
  - converted_to_facture (Nullable(UInt8))
  - paye (Nullable(UInt8))
  - paye_transporteur (Nullable(UInt8))
  - is_transporttnd (Nullable(UInt8))
  - reglement (Nullable(Float64))
  - total (Nullable(Float64))
  - frais_transport (Nullable(Float64))
  - provider_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - transporteur_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - bondecommande_id (Nullable(Int64))
Primary/Order key: delivery_note_key

Table: gold.dim_depot
Columns:
  - depot_key (Int64)
  - depot_id (Int64)
  - nom (Nullable(String))
  - adresse (Nullable(String))
  - description (Nullable(String))
  - tel (Nullable(String))
  - capitale (Nullable(Float64))
  - responsable_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - created_at (Nullable(DateTime64(6)))
Primary/Order key: depot_key

Business Context:
Warehouse/depot locations. Columns: depot_key, name (warehouse name), location, region. Use 'name' for warehouse name, NOT 'nom'. Join with fact_sales.depot_key.

Table: gold.dim_employee
Columns:
  - employee_key (Int64)
  - employee_id (Int64)
  - firstname (Nullable(String))
  - lastname (Nullable(String))
  - email (Nullable(String))
  - telephone (Nullable(String))
  - tache_employer (Nullable(String))
  - type_employer (Nullable(String))
Primary/Order key: employee_key

Table: gold.dim_invoice
Columns:
  - invoice_key (Int64)
  - invoice_id (Int64)
  - dtype (String)
  - reference (Nullable(String))
  - ref_type (Nullable(String))
  - id_ref (Nullable(Int64))
  - creation_date (Nullable(DateTime64(6)))
  - date (Nullable(Date))
  - paye (Nullable(UInt8))
Primary/Order key: invoice_key

Table: gold.dim_manager
Columns:
  - manager_key (Int64)
  - manager_id (Int64)
  - firstname (Nullable(String))
  - lastname (Nullable(String))
  - email (Nullable(String))
  - telephone (Nullable(String))
  - attribut_manager (Nullable(String))
Primary/Order key: manager_key

Table: gold.dim_package
Columns:
  - package_key (Int64)
  - package_id (Int64)
  - qty_paquet_unite (Nullable(Float64))
  - quantite (Nullable(Float64))
  - prix_unitaire (Nullable(Float64))
  - marge_unitaire (Nullable(Float64))
  - marge_gros (Nullable(Float64))
  - min_quantite_gros (Nullable(Float64))
  - remise (Nullable(Float64))
  - levelstock (Nullable(Int32))
Primary/Order key: package_key

Table: gold.dim_product
Columns:
  - product_key (Int64)
  - product_id (Int64)
  - article_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - article_name (Nullable(String))
  - article_description (Nullable(String))
  - article_unite (Nullable(String))
  - paquet_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - qty_paquet_unite (Nullable(Float64))
  - paquet_quantite (Nullable(Float64))
  - paquet_prix_unitaire (Nullable(Float64))
  - product_name (Nullable(String))
  - description (Nullable(String))
  - type_vente (Nullable(String))
  - prix_unitaire (Nullable(Float64))
  - prix_gros (Nullable(Float64))
  - gain_unitaire (Nullable(Float64))
  - gain_gros (Nullable(Float64))
  - gain_percentage (Nullable(UInt8))
  - gain_percentage_gros (Nullable(UInt8))
  - min_quantite_gros (Nullable(Float64))
  - remise (Nullable(Float64))
  - taxe (Nullable(Float64))
  - levelstock (Nullable(Float64))
  - illimite (Nullable(UInt8))
  - is_label (Nullable(UInt8))
  - labelplu (Nullable(String))
  - ugs (Nullable(String))
  - product_image_path (Nullable(String))
  - created_at (Nullable(DateTime64(6)))
  - valid_from (Nullable(DateTime64(3)))
  - valid_to (Nullable(DateTime64(3)))
  - is_current (UInt8)
Primary/Order key: product_key

Business Context:
Individual

- product_image_path (Nullable(String))
  - created_at (Nullable(DateTime64(6)))
  - valid_from (Nullable(DateTime64(3)))
  - valid_to (Nullable(DateTime64(3)))
  - is_current (UInt8)
Primary/Order key: product_key

Business Context:
Individual product catalog (3302+ items, SCD Type 2). CRITICAL FIELDS: product_key (join key), product_name (individual product), article_id (link to article/category), article_name (CATEGORY/ARTICLE name). Use is_current=1 for active products. BRIDGE: To group by article/category, GROUP BY article_id or article_name.

Table: gold.dim_provider
Columns:
  - provider_key (Int64)
  - provider_id (Int64)
  - nom_societe (Nullable(String))
  - adresse_societe (Nullable(String))
  - email_societe (Nullable(String))
  - telephone_societe (Nullable(Int64))
  - matricule_fiscale (Nullable(String))
  - email (Nullable(String))
  - telephone (Nullable(String))
  - firstname (Nullable(String))
  - lastname (Nullable(String))
Primary/Order key: provider_key

Table: gold.dim_purchase_order
Columns:
  - po_key (Int64)
  - po_id (Int64)
  - reference (Nullable(String))
  - adresse_livraison (Nullable(String))
  - statut_commande (Nullable(String))
  - created_at (Nullable(DateTime64(6)))
  - date (Nullable(Date))
  - date_livraison_prevue (Nullable(Date))
  - montant_total (Nullable(Float64))
  - provider_id (Nullable(Int64))
Primary/Order key: po_key

Table: gold.dim_responsable
Columns:
  - responsable_key (Int64)
  - responsable_id (Int64)
  - firstname (Nullable(String))
  - lastname (Nullable(String))
  - email (Nullable(String))
  - telephone (Nullable(String))
  - responsable_depot_no (Nullable(String))
Primary/Order key: responsable_key

Table: gold.dim_service
Columns:
  - service_key (Int64)
  - service_id (Int64)
  - nom_service_comp (Nullable(String))
  - description_service_comp (Nullable(String))
  - cout_service (Nullable(Float64))
  - taxe (Nullable(Float64))
  - date_debut_service (Nullable(Date))
  - date_fin_service (Nullable(Date))
  - etat_service (Nullable(UInt8))
  - out_service (Nullable(UInt8))
Primary/Order key: service_key

Table: gold.dim_transporter
Columns:
  - transporter_key (Int64)
  - transporter_id (Int64)
  - immatriculev (Nullable(String))
  - firstname (Nullable(String))
  - lastname (Nullable(String))
  - email (Nullable(String))
  - telephone (Nullable(String))
Primary/Order key: transporter_key

Table: gold.dim_user
Columns:
  - user_key (Int64)
  - user_id (Int64)
  - firstname (Nullable(String))
  - lastname (Nullable(String))
  - email (Nullable(String))
  - telephone (Nullable(String))
  - adresse (Nullable(String))
  - role (Nullable(String))
Primary/Order key: user_key

Table: gold.fact_consumption
Columns:
  - consumption_fact_key (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - product_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - depot_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - employee_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - quantity_consumed (Float64)
  - unit_cost (Float64)
  - total_cost (Float64)
  - type (Nullable(String))
  - type_vente (Nullable(String))
Primary/Order key: date_key, consumption_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_consumption.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_consumption.product_key references dim_product.product_key
  - fact_consumption.depot_key references dim_depot.depot_key
  - fact_consumption.employee_key references dim_employee.employee_key

Business Context:
Internal stock consumption by employees.

Table: gold.fact_financial_exchange
Columns:
  - financial_exchange_fact_key (Int64)
  - exchange_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - currency_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - user_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - customer_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - provider_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - transporter_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - montant (Float64)
  - flow_in_amount (Float64)
  - flow_out_amount (Float64)
Primary/Order key: date_key, financial_exchange_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_financial_exchange.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_financial_exchange.currency_key references dim_currency.currency_key
  - fact_financial_exchange.user_key references dim_user.user_key
  - fact_financial_exchange.customer_key references dim_customer.customer_key
  - fact_financial_exchange.provider_key references dim_provider.provider_key
  - fact_financial_exchange.transporter_key references dim_transporter.transporter_key

Business Context:
Cash flow in/out by currency.

Table: gold.fact_goods_receipts
Columns:
  - receipt_fact_key (Int64)
  - bondelivraison_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - ligne_bonde_livraison_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - delivery_note_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - provider_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - transporter_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - product_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - currency_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - depot_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - qty_received (Float64)
  - qty_purchased (Float64)
  - prix_transport (Float64)
  - total_bl (Float64)
  - reglement (Float64)
  - transport_cost (Float64)
  - receiving_variance_qty (Float64)
  - unpaid_amount (Float64)
Primary/Order key: date_key, receipt_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_goods_receipts.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_goods_receipts.delivery_note_key references dim_delivery_note.delivery_note_key
  - fact_goods_receipts.provider_key references dim_provider.provider_key
  - fact_goods_receipts.transporter_key references dim_transporter.transporter_key
  - fact_goods_receipts.product_key references dim_product.product_key
  - fact_goods_receipts.currency_key references dim_currency.currency_key
  - fact_goods_receipts.depot_key references dim_depot.depot_key

Business Context:
Goods received from suppliers. Use qty_received vs qty_purchased for receiving variance.

Table: gold.fact_inventory_count
Columns:
  - inventory_count_fact_key (Int64)
  - inventory_line_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - product_key (Int64)
  - depot_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - responsible_key (Int64)
  - quantite_reelle (Float64)
  - difference (Float64)
Primary/Order key: date_key, inventory_count_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_inventory_count.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_inventory_count.product_key references dim_product.product_key
  - fact_inventory_count.depot_key references dim_depot.depot_key

Business Context:
Physical inventory count results vs system quantity.

Table: gold.fact_inventory_snapshot
Columns:
  - inventory_snapshot_fact_key (UInt64)
  - snapshot_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - product_key (Int64)
  - depot_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - quantity_on_hand (Float64)
  - stock_value_at_cost (Float64)
  - stock_value_at_sale (Float64)
  - low_stock_flag (UInt8)
Primary/Order key: date_key, inventory_snapshot_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_inventory_snapshot.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_inventory_snapshot.product_key references dim_product.product_key
  - fact_inventory_snapshot.depot_key references dim_depot.depot_key

Business Context:
Daily inventory levels. Use quantity_on_hand, stock_value_at_cost, low_stock_flag.

Table: gold.fact_invoice_lines
Columns:
  - invoice_line_fact_key (Int64)
  - facture_id (Int64)
  - lignefacture_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - product_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - invoice_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - depot_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - currency_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - customer_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - provider_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - transporter_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - qty_invoiced (Float64)
  - prix_achat (Float64)
  - prix_unitaire (Float64)
  - prix_vente (Float64)
  - prix_transport (Float64)
  - remise_ligne_facture (Float64)
  - taxe_ligne_facture (Float64)
  - montant_total (Float64)
Primary/Order key: date_key, invoice_line_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_invoice_lines.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_invoice_lines.product_key references dim_product.product_key
  - fact_invoice_lines.invoice_key references dim_invoice.invoice_key
  - fact_invoice_lines.depot_key references dim_depot.depot_key
  - fact_invoice_lines.currency_key references dim_currency.currency_key
  - fact_invoice_lines.customer_key references dim_customer.customer_key
  - fact_invoice_lines.provider_key references dim_provider.provider_key
  - fact_invoice_lines.transporter_key references dim_transporter.transporter_key

Business Context:
Invoice line details with product/pricing info. KEY COLUMNS: invoice_line_fact_key (PK), invoice_key, product_key (INDIVIDUAL PRODUCT, not article), customer_key, depot_key, date_key.

KEY COLUMNS: invoice_line_fact_key (PK), invoice_key, product_key (INDIVIDUAL PRODUCT, not article), customer_key, depot_key, date_key. CRITICAL: fact_invoice_lines has product_key which links to INDIVIDUAL products. To get ARTICLE/CATEGORY level: JOIN product_key → dim_product.product_key → use dim_product.article_id or dim_product.article_name. NEVER use article_key directly here. Amounts: montant_total (line total), prix_vente (selling price), prix_achat (purchase price), prix_transport (transport cost). Use montant_total for revenue.

Table: gold.fact_payment_schedule
Columns:
  - payment_schedule_fact_key (Int64)
  - tranche_id (Int64)
  - cloture_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - currency_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - user_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - invoice_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - po_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - montant_tranche (Float64)
  - statut_payement_flag (UInt8)
  - closure_validated_amount (Float64)
  - closure_cash_amount (Float64)
Primary/Order key: date_key, payment_schedule_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_payment_schedule.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_payment_schedule.currency_key references dim_currency.currency_key
  - fact_payment_schedule.user_key references dim_user.user_key
  - fact_payment_schedule.invoice_key references dim_invoice.invoice_key

Business Context:
Payment installments. Use statut_payement_flag=1 for paid tranches.

Table: gold.fact_product_history
Columns:
  - product_history_fact_key (Int64)
  - historique_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - product_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - previous_price (Nullable(Float64))
  - previous_quantity (Nullable(Float64))
  - prix_historique_achat (Nullable(Float64))
  - prix_unitaire_applique (Nullable(Float64))
  - quantite_historique_achat (Nullable(Float64))
  - ecart_valeur (Nullable(Float64))
Primary/Order key: date_key, product_history_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_product_history.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_product_history.product_key references dim_product.product_key

Table: gold.fact_purchase_order_lines
Columns:
  - po_line_fact_key (Int64)
  - bondecommande_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - ligne_bande_commande_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - po_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - provider_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - currency_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - product_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - article_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - ordered_qty (Float64)
  - prix_unitaire (Float64)
  - prix_vente (Float64)
  - montant_total (Float64)
  - remise_ligne_bon_de_commande (Float64)
  - taxe_ligne_bon_de_commande (Float64)
  - ordered_net_amount (Float64)
Primary/Order key: date_key, po_line_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_purchase_order_lines.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_purchase_order_lines.provider_key references dim_provider.provider_key
  - fact_purchase_order_lines.currency_key references dim_currency.currency_key
  - fact_purchase_order_lines.product_key references dim_product.product_key
  - fact_purchase_order_lines.article_key references dim_article.article_key

Business Context:
Purchase order lines sent to suppliers.

Table: gold.fact_sales
Columns:
  - sales_fact_key (Int64)
  - vente_id (Int64)
  - vente_dtype (String)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - product_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - customer_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - employee_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - user_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - depot_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - currency_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - qty_sold (Float64)
  - unit_price (Float64)
  - selling_price (Float64)
  - remise_ligne_vente (Float64)
  - taxe_ligne_vente (Float64)
  - line_sales_amount (Float64)
  - line_net_amount (Float64)
  - estimated_cost (Float64)
  - gross_margin (Float64)
Primary/Order key: date_key, sales_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_sales.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_sales.product_key references dim_product.product_key
  - fact_sales.customer_key references dim_customer.customer_key
  - fact_sales.employee_key references dim_employee.employee_key
  - fact_sales.user_key references dim_user.user_key
  - fact_sales.depot_key references dim_depot.depot_key
  - fact_sales.currency_key references dim_currency.currency_key

Business Context:
Individual sales line items from POS and invoices. PRIMARY KEY: sales_fact_key. For COUNT use: COUNT(*) or COUNT(sales_fact_key). Columns: sales_fact_key, document_key, depot_key, product_key, customer_key, date_key, line_net_amount, gross_margin, qty_sold. Use line_net_amount for net revenue, gross_margin for profit, qty_sold for volume.

Table: gold.fact_sales_header
Columns:
  - sales_header_fact_key (Int64)
  - vente_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - customer_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - employee_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - total_sale (Float64)
  - reglement (Float64)
  - frais (Float64)
  - paye_flag (UInt8)
  - print_flag (UInt8)
  - sale_count (UInt8)
Primary/Order key: date_key, sales_header_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_sales_header.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_sales_header.customer_key references dim_customer.customer_key
  - fact_sales_header.employee_key references dim_employee.employee_key

Business Context:
Sales transaction totals. Use total_sale for transaction value, reglement for amount paid.

Table: gold.fact_service_lines
Columns:
  - service_line_fact_key (Int64)
  - ligneservice_id (Int64)
  - service_request_id (Nullable(Int64))
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - service_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - customer_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - employee_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - qty (Float64)
  - cout_service (Float64)
  - prix_vente (Float64)
  - remise_ligne_service (Float64)
  - taxe_ligne_service (Float64)
  - request_type (String)
Primary/Order key: date_key, service_line_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_service_lines.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_service_lines.service_key references dim_service.service_key
  - fact_service_lines.customer_key references dim_customer.customer_key
  - fact_service_lines.employee_key references dim_employee.employee_key

Business Context:
Individual service line items.

Table: gold.fact_service_request
Columns:
  - service_request_fact_key (Int64)
  - service_request_id (Int64)
  - creation_date_key (UInt32)
  - estimated_end_date_key (UInt32)
  - payment_date_key (UInt32)
  - close_date_key (UInt32)
  - customer_key (Int64)
  - employee_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - avance (Float64)
  - prix_supplimentaire (Float64)
  - prix_total (Float64)
  - timbre (Float64)
  - total_cout_service (Float64)
  - total_produits (Float64)
  - paid_flag (UInt8)
  - request_type (String)
Primary/Order key: creation_date_key, service_request_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_service_request.customer_key references dim_customer.customer_key
  - fact_service_request.employee_key references dim_employee.employee_key

Business Context:
Customer service/repair requests with pricing.

Table: gold.fact_stock_movement
Columns:
  - stock_movement_fact_key (Int64)
  - movement_id (Int64)
  - date_key (UInt32)
  - product_key (Nullable(Int64))
  - source_depot_key (Int64)
  - destination_depot_key (Int64)
  - user_key (Int64)
  - qty_transferred (Float64)
  - qty_received (Float64)
  - estimated_unit_cost (Float64)
Primary/Order key: date_key, stock_movement_fact_key
Relationships (joins):
  - fact_stock_movement.date_key references dim_date.date_key
  - fact_stock_movement.product_key references dim_product.product_key
  - fact_stock_movement.user_key references dim_user.user_key

Business Context:
Stock transfers between depots.

Table: gold.reference_registry
Columns:
  - entity_type (String)
  - ref_type (String)
  - ref_value (Nullable(String))
  - ref_norm (Nullable(String))
  - entity_id (String)
  - entity_label (Nullable(String))
  - source_view (String)
